name: content-pipeline
description: Polish a batch of pages through a checked loop, then ship the batch.

steps.instruction:
Claim the next {batch} pages in order and scaffold a proposal for each.
Output the list as page_list.
steps.title: Claim Pages

steps.instruction: Polish {page} to the bar and write the result into its proposal.
steps.title: Polish Page

steps.instruction: Verify every link on {page} resolves (HTTP 200) and is animal-correct.
steps.title: Check Links

steps.instruction: Ship the polished pages live and request indexing.
steps.title: Ship
